claims.summary: Profile aliases and environment values need deterministic normalization with visible fallback for unknown names.
claims.disposition: verify profile resolution, alias normalization, mixed-case handling, and unknown-profile diagnostics

claims.summary: Fallback must keep a compact, parseable contract without losing pressure and spectral texture.
claims.disposition: verify fallback budget, texture preservation, density gradient, and transport reason projections

claims.summary: High-entropy fallback should obey the sentence cap and emit exactly one final NEXT line.
claims.disposition: verify sentence counting, NEXT repair, compatibility-tail suppression, and high-entropy output tests

claims.summary: Profile, provider, sampler, or fallback route should adapt automatically from felt state.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because it changes live model routing and generation policy
